zh.lifeSummary: 當John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton於大約1370年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓時，他的父親Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton24歲，母親Janet Fleming20歲。他於大約1390年與Catherine Sinclair在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1434年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton于大约1370年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓时，他的父亲Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton24岁，母亲Janet Fleming20岁。他于大约1390年与Catherine Sinclair在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1434年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton was born about 1370, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, was 24 and his mother, Janet Fleming, was 20. He married Catherine Sinclair about 1390, in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. He died in 1434, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton est né environ 1370, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Janet Fleming, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Sinclair environ 1390, à Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé en 1434, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton um 1370 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton 24 und seine Mutter Janet Fleming 20. Er hat um 1390 in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Catherine Sinclair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb 1434 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton è nato il circa 1370 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Janet Fleming, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Sinclair circa 1390, nel Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1434, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Seton 2nd Lord of Setonが約1370年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Seton 1st Lord Setonは24歳，母Janet Flemingは20歳であった。約1390年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンプアンスでCatherine Sinclairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1434年に故郷で65歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Verneuil, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Fra: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 베른우일
ko.lifeSummary: John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton(이)가 대략 1370년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Fleming(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1390년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 플레스토파스에서 Catherine Sinclair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Janet Fleming, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Sinclair aproximadamente 1390, em Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1434, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton родился около 1370 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Fleming, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Sinclair около 1390 г. в местности престонпанс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер в 1434 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Catherine Sinclair aproximadamente 1390, en Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas.
